description: Composition Cream kurta made of georgette, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck, embroidered yoke and embroidery all over the front, three quarter sleeves with embroidery at the hem, georgette inner lining and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Wear art wherever you go! The flowy georgette fabric and subtly hued embroidery makes this kurta from aneri a fab buy. Pair it with leggings, heavily embellished sandals and chunky earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
